governance_bootstrap.summary: Cost and production changes require real verification and explicit uncertainty.
Completion evidence must distinguish estimates from provider receipts.

verification.name: migration contract inspection
verification.result: Creates a job-scoped ledger for image generation, rendering, QA, estimates, and actual receipts.

deploy.result: Source-of-truth changes prepared; production migration/application remains pending.

residual_risk: Provider image prices are not hardcoded; IMAGE_GENERATION_UNIT_PRICE_USD must be configured from the provider receipt.
Database migration must be applied before runtime writes.
